product.name: Relay
product.description: B2B order relay between suppliers and retailers

guide: Rust / Actix / Node backend stack ( ANB ) — primary APIs in Rust on actix-web and tokio.
Node is a sidecar only ( admin tooling , asset bundling ) ; never the request-serving hot path.
All handlers return errors via the platform envelope — no ad hoc JSON error bodies.
List endpoints use cursor pagination ; override page size only with paginated and list service macros.
Persistence via sqlx with PostgreSQL ; cache via redis ; async integration via kafka when declared.
CI defaults to GitHub Actions ; images are OCI multi-stage cargo release plus distroless runtime.
Deploy targets Kubernetes or Docker Compose ; health checks expose health and ready routes.
Allowed Rust crates are the default dependency set for generated services ; denied crates fail codegen audit.
Handlers return errors via the platform envelope only
List endpoints use cursor pagination — not offset
